data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. SCOTT VICIOUS has shown good improvement at his last two starts, rewarded with a win last time at Shepparton over 450m. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings three times from four attempts. Can make it two on the bounce. 2. SHE'S NOWHERE ran good time (25.82) winning a Bottom Up - Grade 7 at Warrnambool when jumping from this same box. This tougher but looks a leading chance again. 1. NOVEMBER CHARGE has mixed form a little and missed the frame the last two but was a Maiden winner three back (22.72) at this track over 390m. This looks easier and expected to improve sharply. 8. SPRUIKING is not to be discarded.","runners":[6,2,1,8],"exclusive":false}
